linkedin_profile.headline: Graduate Researcher in Survey Methodology, Trustworthy AI, and Computational Social Science
linkedin_profile.headline_short: Graduate Researcher in Survey Methodology, Trustworthy AI, and Computational Social Science
linkedin_profile.about_full: Graduate researcher designing rigorous measurement systems for AI-enabled research. Current work connects survey methodology, causal inference, geospatial epidemiology, and trustworthy automation for public-data infrastructure. Published peer-reviewed survey research and presented transformer-based sentiment analysis findings at AAPOR.
linkedin_profile.about_short: Graduate researcher designing rigorous measurement systems for AI-enabled research. Current work connects survey methodology, causal inference, geospatial epidemiology, and trustworthy automation for public-data infrastructure.

linkedin_experience.organization: Social Data Science Center, University of Maryland
linkedin_experience.description_full: Built CKAN lifecycle automation for 18 university datasets while preserving full resource accessibility. Redesigned repository taxonomy into thematic hierarchies that lifted search discoverability by 35%. Cut manual metadata upkeep by 90% with schema-safe bulk update tooling.
linkedin_experience.description_short: Built CKAN lifecycle automation for 18 university datasets while preserving full resource accessibility. Redesigned repository taxonomy into thematic hierarchies that lifted search discoverability by 35%.
bullets: Built CKAN lifecycle automation for 18 university datasets while preserving full resource accessibility.
Redesigned repository taxonomy into thematic hierarchies that lifted search discoverability by 35%.

linkedin_experience.organization: Institute for Social Research, University of Michigan
linkedin_experience.description_full: Built a geospatial integration pipeline across 129,572 U.S. census tracts and 3 RUCA strata. Recovered 28.6% baseline missingness while reaching full broadband data completeness. Designed QA checks that flagged 15% spatial-clustering violations and strengthened temporal completeness.
linkedin_experience.description_short: Built a geospatial integration pipeline across 129,572 U.S. census tracts and 3 RUCA strata. Recovered 28.6% baseline missingness while reaching full broadband data completeness.

linkedin_experience.description_full: Supported SURV735 on data privacy and confidentiality for 23 graduate students. Rebuilt Canvas LMS workflows for 10+ instructors and 125+ students, improving setup speed and course satisfaction.
